raw_payload.subject: IFG / Apex HVAC - owner call
raw_payload.body: Intro call between Sam, Monica Reyes from Acme Wealth Partners, and Javier Torres, founder of Apex HVAC. Javier is considering whether to start a sale process in the next 12 months. Discussed recurring maintenance revenue at 38% of sales, a second-layer management team that is improving but not fully independent, and buyer concern around technician retention. Sam offered to send a short buyer-readiness checklist and a view on how recurring maintenance contracts are being valued. Agreed to regroup late next week after Javier reviews the materials with Monica.
next_steps: Sam to send a buyer-readiness checklist
Sam to share a short note on recurring maintenance contract valuation
Regroup late next week after Javier and Monica review the materials
